Klasse SceneResource

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/scenes") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class SceneResource extends Object
REST resource for scene management and activation (FR-17). A scene is a named set of device target states activated with a single action.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    SceneResource()
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    activate(Long id)
    Activates a scene: applies all device target states, logs each change, and sends a notification to the scene owner (FR-17).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    create(@Valid SceneRequest request)
    Creates a new scene with optional device target states (FR-17).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    delete(Long id)
    Deletes a scene.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    getById(Long id)
    Returns a single scene including all device states.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    list(Long userId)
    Lists scenes.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    update(Long id, @Valid SceneRequest request)
    Updates a scene's name and replaces all its device states (FR-17).

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • SceneResource

      public SceneResource()
      Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodendetails

    • list

      @GET public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response list(@QueryParam("userId") Long userId)
      Lists scenes. Optionally filtered by userId.
      Parameter:
      userId - optional filter by owner user ID
      Gibt zurück:
      list of scenes

    • getById

      @GET @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getById(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Returns a single scene including all device states.
      Parameter:
      id - the scene ID
      Gibt zurück:
      the scene or 404

    • create

      @POST public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response create(@Valid @Valid SceneRequest request)
      Creates a new scene with optional device target states (FR-17).
      Parameter:
      request - the scene definition
      Gibt zurück:
      201 with the created scene

    • update

      @PUT @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response update(@PathParam("id") Long id, @Valid @Valid SceneRequest request)
      Updates a scene's name and replaces all its device states (FR-17).
      Parameter:
      id - the scene ID
      request - the updated scene definition
      Gibt zurück:
      200 with the updated scene

    • delete

      @DELETE @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response delete(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Deletes a scene.
      Parameter:
      id - the scene ID
      Gibt zurück:
      204 on success

    • activate

      @POST @Path("/{id}/activate") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response activate(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Activates a scene: applies all device target states, logs each change, and sends a notification to the scene owner (FR-17).
      Parameter:
      id - the scene ID
      Gibt zurück:
      200 with a confirmation message
